title: T-047 — UI: WO detail tabs (consumption/output/waste/genealogy/history) + scanner deep-link cards (SCR-08-02 / SCR-08-12)
prompt:
# T-047 — WO detail tabs + scanner deep-link cards UI

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-02, SCR-08-12, §7.2-7.4 (consumption/output/waste FRs)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/wo-detail.jsx:256-345 (consumption_tab), :346-408 (output_tab), :453-503 (genealogy_tab), :504-530 (history_tab); production/modals.jsx:208-240 (scanner_modal)

## Goal
Build the consumption/output/waste/genealogy/history tabs of the WO detail page (the shell from T-046) and the scanner-linked reference cards pattern for SCR-08-12. Tabs surface FEFO badges, over-consumption flags, catch-weight status, QA holds, label PDF, BOM snapshot version, and append-only event log; scanner cards issue 15-minute signed single-use deep-links and do not mutate data.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/consume/page.tsx (RSC) — consumption_tab parity: BOM components table with planned/consumed/remaining + Progress + FEFO/auto-consumed/over-consumption badges; LP scan log sidebar (ScrollArea); operator hints card (next FEFO pick, batch fit, ETA); `Scan next LP` opens scanner deep-link card.
2. apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/output/page.tsx (RSC) — output_tab parity: primary outputs + co-products + by-products tables with QA badge, label print link, catch-weight mode toggle; `Register output LP` opens RegisterOutputModal (separate task; here only the open trigger + empty placeholder).
3. apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/waste/page.tsx (RSC) — waste tab: events list (category/qty/reason/operator) with link to waste_modal trigger.
4. apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/genealogy/page.tsx (RSC) — genealogy_tab parity: two-column tree (consumed inputs / output LPs), forward/backward toggle via `?direction=`, shipment links section, Export mock-recall JSON Server Action stub.
5. apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/history/page.tsx (RSC) — history_tab parity: append-only `wo_events` table with Tx column + Export JSON link.
6. apps/web/components/production/scanner-deeplink-card.tsx ('use client') — generates signed JWT (15-min single-use, `{wo_id, line_id, action, operator_id, exp}`), renders QR code + copy-link; no desktop mutation side effect.
7. Literal `data-prototype-label` markers: `consumption_tab`, `output_tab`, `genealogy_tab`, `history_tab`, `scanner_modal`. All copy via next-intl.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the consumption/output/waste/genealogy/history tabs render, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/wo-detail.jsx:256-530 and modals.jsx:208-240, then per-tab parity holds: BOM table + FEFO/over-consumption/auto-consumed badges + LP log sidebar (consumption); primary/co/by-product tables + QA badge + label link (output); waste events list; two-column genealogy tree with forward/backward toggle; append-only history table + Export JSON — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist + visible `data-prototype-label` markers.
2. Given a Shift Lead clicks `Open on Scanner` on a consumption card, when the action fires, then a signed JWT with `{wo_id, line_id, action='CONSUME_LP', operator_id, exp}` (≤15 min) is generated and rendered as QR + copy-link without any Production data being mutated.
3. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (or documented blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback) for consumption/output/waste/genealogy/history surfaces.

## Test strategy
- RED: apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/__tests__/tabs.test.tsx + apps/web/components/production/__tests__/scanner-deeplink-card.test.tsx asserting per-tab parity, badge variants, JWT contract (15-min single-use, no mutation), and `data-prototype-label` markers before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/__tests__/tabs.test.tsx apps/web/components/production/__tests__/scanner-deeplink-card.test.tsx`
- For UI parity, capture screenshots + Playwright trace; attach paths.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not let scanner deep-link cards mutate Production data — they are issuance-only.
- Do not bypass JWT signing/expiry (15-min, single-use claim).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim; translate to shadcn primitives + next-intl.
- Do not render Tx hash or actor PII (use denormalized `actor_name`).

pipeline_inputs.description: WO detail consumption/output/waste/genealogy/history tabs + SCR-08-12 scanner deep-link cards pattern; cards issue signed 15-min single-use JWTs and never mutate Production data.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity per tab against prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/wo-detail.jsx:256-530 (consumption_tab/output_tab/genealogy_tab/history_tab) and modals.jsx:208-240 (scanner_modal). FEFO/over-consumption/auto-consumed badges derived from server data not client-computed. LP scan log uses ScrollArea. Genealogy uses forward/backward URL param. History table is INSERT-only (no UPDATE/DELETE per audit). Scanner cards generate signed JWT with claims {wo_id, line_id, action, operator_id, exp} and never mutate Production data — issuance only. UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Do not implement label PDF generation (T-033)
Do not implement allergen changeover screen (T-048)

Given a Shift Lead clicks Open on Scanner on a consumption card, when the action fires, then a signed JWT with {wo_id, line_id, action='CONSUME_LP', operator_id, exp} (<=15 min) is generated and rendered as QR + copy-link without any Production data being mutated.

test_strategy: RED: apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/__tests__/tabs.test.tsx + apps/web/components/production/__tests__/scanner-deeplink-card.test.tsx asserting per-tab parity, badge variants, JWT 15-min single-use no-mutation contract and data-prototype-label markers before code exists.
For UI parity, capture screenshots and Playwright trace/video/artifacts; attach paths in closeout.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Scanner consumes deep-link JWT and SCN-080..084 endpoints; here Production only issues the token.
LP availability/status/QA-hold/putaway data shown in tabs comes from Warehouse.
QA hold badge on output_tab links to Quality module.
